footer.corroNewWindowLabel: Corro on GitHub, opens in a new window
footer.licenseNewWindowLabel: AGPL-3.0 license, opens in a new window

_comment: This file contains English translations and serves as reference for translators. Now processed like any other language for consistency.

lobby.teamPoolEmpty: Everyone is placed in a team

rules.heading: Match rules settings
rules.hint: Tune the rules for this game. The defaults match the standard rules.
rules.doubleGoSalary: Double salary when landing exactly on GO
rules.auctionOnDecline: Auction a property when the buyer declines it
rules.evenBuildRule: Build evenly across a colour group
rules.noBuildingFirstLap: No building until you complete your first lap
rules.freeParkingJackpot: Centre pot (taxes and fines go to it)

lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for host to start the game...

errors.assignTeam: Could not move the player between teams
errors.addBot: Could not add or remove the bot
errors.connection: Connection error. Some features may not be available.
errors.gameNotFound: No game found with that code
errors.gameNotAccepting: This game is no longer accepting new players
errors.validateCode: Error validating code. Please check and try again.
errors.invalidInviteCode: That code does not match any game or player session.
errors.hostOnly: Only the host can start the game
errors.invalidGameId: Error: Could not start game. Invalid game ID.
errors.disconnected: You have been disconnected from the server

unlock.title: Unlock code
unlock.prompt: Enter a code to reveal hidden games.
unlock.label: Unlock code
unlock.none: No game was unlocked with that code.

savedGames.heading: Your games
savedGames.empty: You don't have any games yet. Create a new one or join with a code.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete game
deleteConfirm.message: Everyone connected will be disconnected and the game progress will be lost. This cannot be undone.

rejoin.title: Return to your game
rejoin.found: Player code recognized: the session of
rejoin.statusWaiting: The game has not started yet.
rejoin.connectedWarning: Somebody is connected on that session right now. You can only enter once they disconnect.
rejoin.hint: Note it somewhere safe: if you lose your browser data or switch devices, type it as the game code and you will get your seat back.

surface_intro.loading: Focus will move automatically to the game's main area when loading finishes. Press Control plus F1 to view the shortcuts.
surface_intro.board: Focus moves automatically to the board. Use the arrow keys to explore it; your screen reader will announce each position. Press Control plus F1 to view this game's shortcuts.
surface_intro.hand: Focus moves automatically to your hand. Use Up Arrow and Down Arrow to move through the cards; your screen reader will announce each one. Press Control plus F1 to view this game's shortcuts.

actions.cannot_buy_no_money: You can't buy this property: you don't have enough money.
actions.cannot_end_must_roll: You can't end your turn yet: you rolled doubles, roll again.
actions.cannot_end_debt: You can't end your turn yet: resolve your debt first.
actions.wait_settling: Wait: the move is still playing out.
actions.confirm_pass_auction: You're on {{property}} and haven't bought it. Ending your turn puts it up for auction. Are you sure?
actions.confirm_pass_discard: You're on {{property}} and haven't bought it. Ending your turn gives it up. Are you sure?

game.manage_no_properties: You don't own any properties yet.
game.hand_not_playable: That card can't be played now.
game.hand_show_all_applied: All cards now follow the selected order.
game.hand_prioritize_playable_applied: Playable cards now appear before the others.
game.go_key_missing: Shortcut g: no square with key "go" found in JSON.
game.j_key_missing: Shortcut j: no square with key "holding" found in JSON.
game.you_own_whole_group: You own the whole colour group
game.announce_owned_none: You don't own any property yet
game.announce_unowned_none: There are no unowned squares left
game.property_info_rent_utility_one: With one {{utility}} owned: 4 times the dice roll
game.property_info_rent_utility_both: With both {{utility}} owned: 10 times the dice roll
game.property_info_no_details: No additional information for this space.
game.announce_turn_with_debt: Turn: {{player}}. The game is waiting for {{debtor}} to resolve their debts.
game.announce_no_turns: There are no turns in this game
game.not_found_message: This game doesn't exist or has already ended. Taking you back to the start.
game.game_deleted_message: The host deleted this game. You will be redirected to the lobby.
game.race_exited: {{player}} brings a piece into play, on their start (square {{square}})
game.race_exited_self: You bring a piece into play, on your start (square {{square}})
game.race_moved_self: You advance a piece to square {{square}}
game.race_moved_corridor: {{player}} advances a piece along their final corridor
game.race_moved_corridor_self: You advance a piece along your final corridor
game.race_barrier_formed_self: You form a barrier on square {{square}}!
game.race_landed_safe: {{player}}'s counter rests on a safe square
game.race_landed_safe_self: Your counter rests on a safe square
game.race_captured_self: You capture one of {{victim}}'s pieces! {{bonus}} bonus
game.race_captured_victim: Your piece on square {{square}} was captured by {{player}}
game.race_forced_exit: A {{value}} means {{player}} must bring a piece into play: their other pieces are locked this turn
game.race_forced_exit_self: A {{value}} means you must bring a piece into play: your other pieces are locked this turn
game.race_forced_barrier: After rolling a {{value}}, {{player}} must open their barrier
game.race_forced_barrier_self: Rolling a {{value}} means you must open your barrier: only its pieces may move
game.race_goal: {{player}} brings a piece to the goal! {{bonus}} bonus
game.race_goal_self: You bring a piece to the goal! {{bonus}} bonus
game.race_three_sixes: Three sixes! {{player}}'s last moved piece goes home
game.race_three_sixes_self: Three sixes! Your last moved piece goes home
game.race_three_sixes_spared_self: Three sixes! You lose the turn
game.race_won: {{player}} has brought every piece to the goal and WINS!
game.race_won_self: You brought every piece to the goal! You WIN!
game.chat_disclaimer: Messages are not encrypted on the server: a database administrator could read them.
game.track_bounced: {{player}} overshoots the goal and bounces back to square {{square}}
game.track_bounced_self: You overshoot the goal and bounce back to square {{square}}
game.track_overshoot_stay: {{player}} needs the exact count and stays put
game.track_overshoot_stay_self: You need the exact count: you stay put
game.track_effect_down_self: You slide down from square {{from}} to {{to}}
game.track_won_self: You reach the goal! You WIN!
game.track_finished: {{player}} reaches the goal and finishes in position {{place}}
game.track_finished_self: You reach the goal! You finish in position {{place}}
game.trivia_roll_again: {{player}} lands on Roll Again and rolls again
game.trivia_roll_again_self: You land on Roll Again — roll again!
game.trivia_wedges_complete: {{player}} has all six wedges — to the centre!
game.trivia_wedges_complete_self: You have all six wedges — head to the centre!
game.trivia_won: {{player}} answers the final question and WINS!
game.trivia_won_self: You answer the final question and WIN!
game.trivia_judge_prompt: Judge {{player}}'s answer, "{{answer}}". The correct answer is: {{correct}}
game.trivia_pos_spoke: Spoke toward $t({{dest}}), at {{hour}} o'clock, {{steps}} from the centre
game.trivia_choose_destination: Where do you want to land?
game.trivia_waiting_judge_setup: Waiting for the host to choose a judge
game.trivia_rules_judge_fixed: a fixed judge chosen at the start
game.race_team_won: {{playerA}} and {{playerB}} bring every counter home and WIN as a team!
game.race_team_won_self: Your team brought every counter home! You WIN!
game.race_finished_team: {{player}} brings every counter home and now moves their partner's
game.race_finished_team_self: Every counter home! You now move your partner's counters
game.race_finished: {{player}} brings every piece to the goal and finishes in position {{place}}
game.race_finished_self: Every piece home! You finish in position {{place}}
game.journey_coup_offer: You are under attack and HOLD the immunity! You may answer with a coup fourré
game.journey_coup: COUP FOURRÉ! {{player}} cancels {{attacker}}'s attack and steals the turn
game.journey_coup_self: COUP FOURRÉ! You cancel {{attacker}}'s attack: bonus points and the turn is yours
game.journey_hand_won: {{player}} completes the {{goal}} kilometres! The hand is over
game.journey_hand_won_self: You complete the {{goal}} kilometres! The hand is over
game.journey_hand_exhausted: No cards left: the hand is over
game.journey_hand_score_self: You score {{total}} points this hand: {{match}} overall
game.journey_no_cards_skip: {{player}} has no cards: the turn passes
game.journey_no_cards_skip_self: You can't play any card: your turn passes
game.journey_stopped: You can't advance: you are stopped
game.journey_overshoot: You would overshoot the goal: the finish is exact
game.journey_card_limit: You already played that card as often as this hand allows
game.journey_target_immune: That rival is immune to this attack
game.journey_target_already: That rival already suffers that problem
game.journey_card_not_in_hand: That card is not in your hand
game.journey_no_attackable: No rival can take that attack right now
game.journey_coup_body: You were attacked with {{card}} and hold the immunity. Answer now for the bonus — and the turn becomes yours.
game.help_cmd_journey_deck: Read the cards remaining in the deck
game.assembly_hit_shieldBurned: {{target}}'s $t({{piece}}) protection absorbs the hit and is lost
game.assembly_hit_shieldBurned_victim: Your $t({{piece}})'s protection absorbs the hit and is lost
game.assembly_swapped_self: You hand over your $t({{given}}) and take {{target}}'s $t({{piece}})
game.assembly_swapped_victim: {{player}} takes your $t({{piece}}) and leaves you their $t({{given}})!
game.assembly_color_taken: You already have a piece of that type
game.assembly_color_taken_theirs: The rival already has a piece of that type
game.assembly_color_mismatch: That card doesn't fit that piece
game.assembly_nothing_to_spread: You have no damage to spread onto clean pieces
game.assembly_no_hands_to_scrap: No rival has cards in hand
game.assembly_must_act: With cards in hand you must play or discard
game.assembly_discard_too_many: You may discard at most 3 cards
game.assembly_card_not_in_hand: That card is not in your hand
game.assembly_no_attackable: No rival has a piece that can take it
game.assembly_nothing_to_fix: You have no piece to apply it to
game.assembly_nothing_to_swap: No legal exchange exists right now
game.assembly_nothing_to_steal: There is no piece you can take
game.pick_cancelled: Cancelled, the card stays in your hand
game.assembly_pick_give_slot: Which of your pieces do you give in exchange?
game.help_cmd_assembly_piles: Read the deck and discard counts
game.assembly_help_piece: Piece: place it in your collection (only one of each type). The first player with {{goal}} distinct pieces in good shape wins.
game.assembly_help_piece_wild: Joker piece: counts as whichever one you are missing. Only one allowed, and the first player with {{goal}} distinct pieces in good shape wins.
game.assembly_help_attack: Attack: thrown at a rival's {{system}} piece, leaving it damaged (it doesn't count toward winning). A second attack destroys it. On a protected piece it burns the protection. Secured pieces are untouchable.
game.assembly_help_remedy: Repair for {{system}}: if it's damaged, it fixes it; if it's in good shape, it protects it (the next attack burns the protection); a second protection secures it: untouchable forever.
game.assembly_help_swap: Swap one of your pieces for a rival's, damage and protections included. Secured pieces can't move, and no one may end with two pieces of one type.
game.assembly_help_steal: Take a rival's (non-secured) piece of a type you are missing, state included.
game.assembly_help_plague: Your damage jumps onto rivals' clean pieces, type by type. You need at least one damaged piece of your own with a valid destination.
game.assembly_help_scrap: Every other player discards their whole hand face-down.
game.assembly_help_fullswap: Swap your entire collection with a rival of your choice, secured pieces included.
game.draft_round_started: Round {{round}}: {{count}} cards are dealt to each player. Pick one card in secret.
game.draft_picked_self: You pick $t({{card}}). Waiting for the others.
game.draft_picked_two_self: You pick $t({{card}}) and $t({{card2}}). Waiting for the others.
game.draft_repicked_two_self: You change your pick to $t({{card}}) and $t({{card2}}).
game.draft_revealed_boosted: {{player}} plays $t({{card}}) onto their $t({{multiplier}}), multiplying it by {{factor}}
game.draft_revealed_boosted_self: You play $t({{card}}) onto your $t({{multiplier}}), multiplying it by {{factor}}
game.draft_hands_passed: The hands rotate to the left: {{count}} cards in each.
game.draft_dessert_bonus: {{player}} gains {{points}} for hoarding the most desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_dessert_bonus_self: You gain {{points}} for hoarding the most desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_dessert_penalty: {{player}} loses {{points}} for ending with the fewest desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_dessert_penalty_self: You lose {{points}} for ending with the fewest desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_extra_returned: {{player}} spends their $t({{extra}}): it rejoins the passing hand
game.draft_extra_returned_self: You spend your $t({{extra}}): it rejoins the hand you pass
game.draft_not_in_hand: That card is not in your hand
game.draft_not_seated: You are not in this game
game.draft_same_card: The two cards must be different
game.draft_needs_extra: Taking two cards needs an extra waiting on your table
game.draft_too_many_picks: You can take at most two cards
game.help_cmd_draft_deck: Read the cards remaining in the deck
game.draft_help_points: Worth {{value}} points at round end. With a free multiplier on your table, it lands on it and multiplies its value.
game.draft_help_multiplier: Waits on your table and multiplies the next points card you play by {{factor}}. Worth nothing alone.
game.draft_help_set: Every group of {{size}} copies is worth {{points}} points at round end; loose copies score nothing.
game.draft_help_scale: The more copies you gather this round, the more the set is worth: {{steps}} points.
game.draft_help_majority: Adds {{icons}} to the round's tally: whoever gathers the most gains {{first}} and the runner-up {{second}}. A tie up top splits the first prize and nobody takes the second.
game.draft_help_dessert: Kept until the end of the game: the most desserts gains {{bonus}} and the fewest loses {{penalty}} (with two players nobody loses).
game.draft_help_extra: Waits on your table: spend it to take TWO cards in one turn (multi-select mode, Ctrl+Space); it then rejoins the hand you pass. Worth no points.
game.hand_multi_on: Multi-select mode: mark cards with Space and send them with Enter.
game.hand_multi_forced: You must pick {{count}} cards: multi-select mode.
game.hand_multi_none: No card is marked. Mark with Space and send with Enter.
game.hand_multi_locked: The game currently requires picking several cards.
game.exploding_game_started: {{count}} cards dealt. {{bombs}} bombs are hidden in the deck.
game.exploding_played_cat_pair: {{player}} plays two matching $t({{card}}) cards to steal a card from {{target}}
game.exploding_played_cat_pair_self: You play two matching $t({{card}}) cards to steal a card from {{target}}
game.exploding_skipped_self: You end the turn without drawing
game.exploding_attacked: {{player}} attacks: the next player draws extra
game.exploding_attacked_self: You attack: the next player draws extra
game.exploding_drew_bomb_defused: {{player}} draws a bomb and defuses it!
game.exploding_drew_bomb_defused_self: You draw a bomb and defuse it!
game.exploding_tucked_self: You tuck the bomb {{depth}} cards below the top
game.exploding_exploded_self: You explode and are knocked out!
game.exploding_window_open: Wait for the current play to resolve
game.exploding_resolve_bomb_first: Tuck the bomb you just defused back first
game.exploding_not_seated: You are not in this game
game.exploding_card_not_in_hand: That card is not in your hand
game.exploding_not_playable: That card cannot be played this way
game.exploding_nothing_to_nope: There is no pending play to cancel
game.exploding_not_a_nope: That card is not a nope
game.exploding_no_bomb_pending: You have no bomb to tuck back
game.exploding_cat_needs_pair: You need two matching cats to steal
game.exploding_no_favor_pending: No one asked you for a favor
game.exploding_favor_asked_victim: {{player}} asks you for a favor: give them a card
game.exploding_stole_empty: {{player}} tries to steal from {{target}}, but they have no cards
game.exploding_stole_empty_self: You try to steal from {{target}}, but they have no cards
game.exploding_no_nope: You have no nope in hand
game.exploding_no_pair: You have no pair card in hand
game.exploding_sorted_pairs_first: Sorted with pair cards first, alphabetically within each group
game.exploding_sorted_attacks_first: Sorted with attacks first, alphabetically within each group
game.exploding_pick_target_pair: Choose who to steal from with two matching {{card}} cards
game.exploding_rules_attack: An attack makes the next player draw {{count}}.
game.exploding_pick_depth: Where do you hide the bomb?
game.exploding_help_bomb: Draw it without a defuse and you explode, out of the game.
game.exploding_help_defuse: Cancels a bomb you just drew and tucks it back into the deck at a depth you choose.
game.exploding_help_attack: End your turn without drawing; the next player draws extra.
game.exploding_help_see_future: Privately look at the top cards of the deck.
game.exploding_help_favor: A player you choose gives you a card from their hand.
game.exploding_help_nope: Cancel a pending action. Off-turn; can be counter-noped.
game.exploding_help_cat: No power alone; play two of a kind to steal a random card from a player you choose.
game.help_cmd_exploding_draw: Draw from the deck (ends your turn)
game.help_cmd_exploding_top: Read the deck and the last card
game.help_cmd_exploding_nope: Jump to a nope to play it (reaction)
game.help_cmd_exploding_pair: Jump to the next pair card
game.shedding_round_started: Round {{round}}: {{count}} cards are dealt. On the table: $t({{card}}).
game.shedding_reversed_self: You flip the direction of play!
game.shedding_stack: {{player}} raises the penalty to {{total}}: the next player stacks another draw card or takes them all
game.shedding_stack_self: You raise the penalty to {{total}}: the next player stacks another draw card or takes them all
game.shedding_drew_playable: You draw $t({{card}}): Enter plays it, Space keeps it and passes.
game.shedding_drew_unplayable: You draw $t({{card}}). It doesn't fit: the turn passes.
game.shedding_deck_empty_self: You cannot draw: no cards remain
game.shedding_round_won: {{player}} runs out of cards and wins round {{round}}! They collect {{points}} points: {{total}} overall
game.shedding_round_won_self: You run out of cards and win round {{round}}! You collect {{points}} points: {{total}} overall
game.shedding_not_seated: You are not in this game
game.shedding_card_not_in_hand: That card is not in your hand
game.shedding_only_drawn: Right now you may only play the card you just drew, or keep it with Space
game.shedding_wild_needs_no_match: It may only be played while you hold no card of the colour in force
game.shedding_bad_color: That colour does not exist in this deck
game.shedding_not_playable: It fits neither by colour, nor by number, nor by action
game.shedding_must_stack: A penalty is waiting: play another draw card to stack it, or draw the pile
game.shedding_no_doubles: Playing several cards at once is not allowed in this game
game.shedding_doubles_numbers_only: Only identical number cards may be played together
game.shedding_last_card_caught_self: You catch {{victim}} without a declaration — they draw {{count}}
game.shedding_last_card_caught_victim: {{catcher}} catches you without a declaration — you draw {{count}}
game.shedding_last_card_caught: {{catcher}} catches {{victim}} without a declaration — they draw {{count}}
game.shedding_last_card_off: The last-card declaration rule is not active in this game
game.shedding_last_card_nothing: You have nothing to declare right now
game.shedding_pending_decision: First decide about the drawn card: Enter plays it, Space keeps it
game.shedding_no_special_cards: No special cards in your hand
game.shedding_pick_color: Which colour do you leave in force with {{card}}?
game.shedding_help_number: Scores {{value}} at the count. Fits by colour or on another {{value}}.
game.shedding_help_skip: The next player loses their turn. Fits by colour or on another skip.
game.shedding_help_reverse: Flips the direction of play (with two players it acts as a skip). Fits by colour or on another reverse.
game.shedding_help_draw_two: The next player draws 2 and loses their turn. Fits by colour or on another draw two.
game.shedding_help_wild: Always playable: you name the colour in force. Leaves 50 points if you are caught with it.
game.shedding_help_wild_draw_four: You name the colour and the next player draws 4 and loses their turn. Only with no card of the colour in force (the table checks it). Leaves 50 points.
game.game_rules_none: This game lists no special rules
game.shedding_rules_draw_play: Play the card you just drew: {{state}}
game.shedding_rules_honest_wild: Honest wild draw four (only with no matching colour): {{state}}
game.shedding_rules_stacking_cross: across kinds (+4 on +2 and vice versa)
game.shedding_rules_last_card: Declare your last card, or be caught: {{state}}
game.help_cmd_last_card_catch: Catch a rival who forgot to declare
game.help_cmd_last_card_watch: Read who is about to win (the watch list)
game.help_cmd_shedding_piles: Read the deck, top card and colour in force
game.help_cmd_shedding_colour_jump: Jump to the next card of a colour: r red, g green, b blue, y yellow
game.help_cmd_shedding_colour_jump_back: Jump to the previous card of that colour
game.help_cmd_shedding_number_jump: Jump to the next card with that number (0 to 9)
game.help_cmd_shedding_number_jump_back: Jump to the previous card with that number
game.help_cmd_shedding_special_jump: Jump to the next special card (wilds, skip, draw…)
game.help_cmd_shedding_special_jump_back: Jump to the previous special card
game.property_rules_double_go: Double salary landing exactly on Start: {{state}}
game.property_rules_max_holding: Maximum turns held before mandatory release: {{count}}
game.property_rules_free_parking: Fines pile up on Free Parking: {{state}}
game.race_rules_exit_on: Leave home on a roll of: {{value}}
game.race_rules_barriers: Barriers (two of your pieces block the square): {{state}}
game.race_rules_three_sixes: Three extra rolls in a row sends a piece home: {{state}}
game.race_rules_six_seven: A 6 moves 7 when none of your pieces are home: {{state}}
game.race_rules_goal_bonus: Bonus steps after reaching the goal: {{steps}}
game.track_rules_roll_again: Roll again on the die's maximum: {{state}}
game.journey_rules_limit: At most {{max}} of a distance value per hand
game.journey_rules_stack: Pile hazards on an already-stopped rival: {{state}}
game.journey_rules_immunities_bonus: Bonus for playing all four immunities: {{points}} points
game.assembly_rules_max_discard: Discard at most {{count}} cards at once
game.draft_rules_dessert: Dessert: +{{bonus}} for the most, {{penalty}} for the fewest
game.journey_help_distance: Advance {{km}} kilometres. The goal is exactly {{goal}} km: you cannot overshoot, and you must be rolling.
game.journey_help_distance_limit: At most {{max}} per hand, and playing it voids the safe-trip bonus.
game.journey_help_distance_over_cap: Cannot be played under a speed limit (cap {{cap}}).
game.journey_help_attack_stopper: Attack: STOPS a rival until they play {{remedy}}. Players holding the matching immunity are unaffected.
game.journey_help_attack_limiter: Attack: limits a rival to cards of {{cap}} km or less until they play {{remedy}}.
game.journey_help_remedy_go: Gets you rolling: you need it at the start of the hand and after repairing any other breakdown.
game.journey_help_remedy_stopper: Cures {{attack}}. Careful: after the repair you are still stopped until you play {{go}}.
game.journey_help_remedy_limiter: Lifts {{attack}}: you may play cards of any distance again.
game.journey_help_immunity: Permanent immunity against {{list}}: playing it cures those troubles and blocks them for the rest of the hand. If attacked while it is in your HAND, you may answer with a coup fourré: a bonus, and the turn passes to you.
game.landed_on_go: {{player}} landed exactly on {{start}} and collects double: {{amount}} {{currencyName}}
game.landed_on_go_self: You land exactly on {{start}} and collect double: {{amount}} {{currencyName}}
game.tax_paid: {{player}} landed on {{square}} and paid {{amount}} {{currencyName}} in taxes
game.tax_paid_self: You landed on {{square}} and paid {{amount}} {{currencyName}} in taxes
game.tax_debt_created: {{player}} landed on {{square}} and owes {{amount}} {{currencyName}} in taxes
game.tax_debt_created_self: You landed on {{square}} and owe {{amount}} {{currencyName}} in taxes
game.tax_partial: {{player}} owes {{requested}} {{currencyName}} in taxes but only has {{paid}} {{currencyName}}
game.holding_speeding: {{player}} is caught speeding and goes straight to {{holding}}!
game.free_parking_empty: {{player}} lands on {{freeparking}} but the pot is empty
game.free_parking_empty_self: You land on {{freeparking}} but the pot is empty
game.card_utility_rent_roll: {{player}} throws the dice for the utility: {{die1}} + {{die2}} = {{total}}, so the rent is 10 times that.
game.landed_on_building: {{player}} lands on {{property}}. Ouch! There's a {{building}} here, and it wants its rent.
game.landed_on_buildings: {{player}} lands on {{property}}. Ouch! {{count}} {{buildings}} stand here, and they all want their rent.
game.landed_on_big_building: {{player}} lands on {{property}}. A whole {{bigBuilding}}, no less! This is going to hurt.
game.group_member_none: You don't own any {{member}} in the {{group}} group yet ({{total}} total).
game.group_member_none_f: You don't own any {{member}} in the {{group}} group yet ({{total}} total).
game.group_member_some: You already own {{count}} of {{total}} {{memberPlural}} in the {{group}} group.
game.panel_money_debt_label: Net balance: {{net}} {{currencyName}}. You are {{short}} {{currencyName}} short of clearing your debts
game.player_reconnected_self: You are reconnected to the game
game.conn_leave_confirm_message: You will leave the game for good and all your properties will return to the bank, as if you had gone bankrupt. This cannot be undone.
game.conn_leave_confirm_message_retire: You will leave the game for good and be out of play; the others will keep playing without you. This cannot be undone.
game.group_completed_self: You now own the entire $t({{colorKey}}) group!
game.used_release_pass: {{player}} uses a release pass and leaves {{holding}}
game.used_release_pass_self: You use a release pass and leave {{holding}}
game.holding_speeding_self: Caught speeding! You go straight to {{holding}}.
game.landed_on_card_self: You landed on a card square
game.mortgage_transfer_fee_self: You pay {{amount, money}} interest to the bank for the mortgaged {{property}}
game.mortgage_inherited_fee_self: You are charged {{amount, money}} interest for inheriting mortgaged properties
game.card_utility_rent_roll_self: You throw the dice for the utility: {{die1}} + {{die2}} = {{total}}, so the rent is 10 times that.
game.rent_not_due_mortgaged: {{player}} lands on {{square}}, owned by {{landlord}}. No rent is due because it is mortgaged.
game.rent_not_due_mortgaged_self: You land on {{square}}, owned by {{landlord}}. You pay nothing because it is mortgaged.
game.landed_on_building_self: You land on {{property}}. Ouch! There's a {{building}} here, and it wants your money.
game.landed_on_buildings_self: You land on {{property}}. Ouch! {{count}} {{buildings}} stand here, and they all want your money.
game.landed_on_big_building_self: You land on {{property}}. A whole {{bigBuilding}}, no less! This is going to hurt.
game.sent_to_holding_by_card: {{player}} is sent to {{holding}} by a card
game.sent_to_holding_by_card_self: You're sent to holding by a card
game.auction_status_with_bid: Auction for {{property}}. Current bid: {{amount}} {{currencyName}}, from {{bidder}}. {{seconds}} seconds left. Your money: {{money}} {{currencyName}}.
game.auction_status_no_bid: Auction for {{property}}. No bids yet. {{seconds}} seconds left. Your money: {{money}} {{currencyName}}.
game.help_cmd_who: Announce who is on the current square
game.help_cmd_property_info: Open the information panel for the current square
game.help_cmd_owner: Announce the owner of the current square
game.help_cmd_group: Announce the group of the current square
game.help_cmd_price: Announce the price of the current square
game.help_cmd_reenter_auction: Reopen the auction you're bidding in
game.help_cmd_go_to_me_single: Go to your token (where you stand)
game.help_cmd_go_my_start: Go to the next circuit landmark (every player's start and corridor entry)
game.help_cmd_go_my_start_prev: Go to the previous circuit landmark
game.help_cmd_prev_occupied: Go to the previous occupied square
game.help_cmd_next_occupied: Go to the next occupied square
game.help_cmd_prev_owned: Go to the previous property you own
game.help_cmd_next_owned: Go to the next property you own
game.help_cmd_prev_unowned: Go to the previous unowned square
game.help_cmd_next_unowned: Go to the next unowned square
game.help_cmd_move_left: Move to the square on the left
game.help_cmd_move_right: Move to the square on the right
game.help_cmd_current_bid: Announce only the highest auction bid
game.help_cmd_focus_chat: Go to the chat message box
game.help_cmd_board_help: Open the game guide (rules and how to play)
game.help_board_open: Game guide (rules and how to play)
game.help_board_none: This board doesn't ship a guide.
game.help_cmd_toggle_sound: Turn game sound effects on or off
game.help_cmd_number_nav: Jump to a square by typing its number
game.auction_started: Auction started for {{property}}! {{player}} declined to buy.
game.auction_cannot_afford: You cannot bid because the minimum bid is {{minimum, money}}, but your money is {{money, money}}.
game.auction_no_bids: No one bid on {{property}}. It remains unowned.
game.trade_completed: {{target}} accepts the trade with {{initiator}}. {{initiator}} gives {{offered}}$t(game.trade_release_pass_suffix, {"count": {{offeredCards}} }); {{target}} gives {{requested}}$t(game.trade_release_pass_suffix, {"count": {{requestedCards}} }).
game.trade_completed_self: You accept the trade with {{initiator}}. {{initiator}} gives {{offered}}$t(game.trade_release_pass_suffix, {"count": {{offeredCards}} }); you give {{requested}}$t(game.trade_release_pass_suffix, {"count": {{requestedCards}} }).
game.trade_no_target: There is no one to trade with.
game.trade_verdict_favorable: Counting money only, you come out ahead.
game.trade_verdict_fair: Counting money only, the deal is balanced.
game.trade_verdict_unfavorable: Counting money only, you come out behind.
game.trade_waiting_message: Waiting for {{name}} to respond. You can cancel.
game.debt_created_bank_self: You owe {{amount, money}} to the bank
game.debts_remaining_self: You still have {{count}} debts to pay
game.debt_cleared: {{player}} has cleared all debt and can roll again
game.debt_cleared_self: You have cleared all your debt. You can roll again
game.mortgage_transfer_fee: {{player}} pays {{amount, money}} interest to the bank for the mortgaged {{property}}
game.mortgage_inherited_fee: {{player}} is charged {{amount, money}} interest for inheriting mortgaged properties
game.player_retired: {{player}} leaves the game. Play goes on without {{player}}.
game.player_retired_self: You leave the game. Play goes on without you.
game.sell_houses_select: Select property and number of {{buildings}} to sell:
game.bankruptcy_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to declare bankruptcy? This action cannot be undone.
game.bankruptcy_to_bank: All your properties will return to the bank.
game.bankruptcy_to_player: All your properties will be transferred to {{creditor}}.
game.turn_with_debt: {{currentPlayer}}'s turn. Waiting for {{debtPlayer}} to resolve debts.
game.game_rule_tax_partial: {{player}} could only pay {{paid}} of the {{requested}} {{currencyName}} in taxes
game.game_rule_player_bankrupt: {{player}} declared bankruptcy with a debt of {{debt}} {{currencyName}} to {{creditor}}
game.conn_rejoin_code: Re-entry code: {{code}}. Press to copy it
game.rejoin_code_copy_failed: The code could not be copied
game.race_option_square_safe: advances to square {{square}}, a safe square
game.help_cmd_shedding_draw: Draw a card (or keep the drawn card and pass)
game.help_cmd_multi_select: Turn multi-select on or off (mark several cards, then Enter to send them)
game.help_cmd_doubles: Mark identical number cards to play them together (Ctrl+Space)
game.help_cmd_barrier: Go to the next barrier on the circuit (yours or anyone's)

session.noSession: No valid session found. You will be redirected to the lobby.

serverErrors.MIN_PLAYERS: More players are needed to start
serverErrors.TOKEN_IN_USE: That token is already in use
serverErrors.DRAW_FIRST: Draw a card before playing or discarding
serverErrors.RESOLVE_COUP_FIRST: Wait: a coup fourré is pending
serverErrors.TRIVIA_NO_PENDING_MOVE: There is no move to make
serverErrors.TRIVIA_ILLEGAL_MOVE: That square is not a legal landing
serverErrors.TRIVIA_NO_PENDING_QUESTION: There is no question right now
serverErrors.TRIVIA_NOT_ANSWERED_YET: No answer has been submitted yet
serverErrors.TRIVIA_NOT_HOST: Only the host picks the judge
serverErrors.TRIVIA_INVALID_JUDGE: That player cannot be the judge
serverErrors.WRONG_FAMILY: That action doesn't exist in this game
serverErrors.TEAMS_INCOMPLETE: Players are missing or someone has no team yet: complete the teams before starting
serverErrors.BOTS_UNSUPPORTED: This game has no bots yet
serverErrors.BAD_TEAM_COUNT: That team count doesn't fit this game's players
serverErrors.INVALID_PLAYER_NAME: Enter a name between 1 and 20 characters without control characters
serverErrors.ASSIGN_TEAM_FAILED: Could not move the player between teams
serverErrors.HOST_ONLY: Only the host can perform this action
serverErrors.PLAYER_NOT_FOUND: Player not found in this game
serverErrors.NOT_AUTHENTICATED: Not authenticated - please join game first
serverErrors.CANNOT_EXECUTE_FOR_OTHERS: Cannot execute commands for other players
serverErrors.UNEVEN_BUILDING: You must build evenly across the colour group
serverErrors.UNEVEN_SELLING: You must sell evenly across the colour group
serverErrors.NO_FULL_GROUP: You must own every property in the colour group
serverErrors.GROUP_MORTGAGED: Unmortgage every property in the group before building
serverErrors.NO_FIRST_LAP: You cannot build until you complete your first lap
serverErrors.MAX_BUILDINGS: This property already has the maximum number of buildings
serverErrors.NO_BUILDINGS: There are no buildings to sell
serverErrors.MORTGAGED: You can't build on a mortgaged property
serverErrors.SQUARE_MISMATCH: That is not the square being played
serverErrors.ALREADY_PASSED: You have already passed in this auction
serverErrors.BID_TOO_LOW: Your bid must beat the highest bid
serverErrors.HIGHEST_BIDDER_CANNOT_PASS: You are winning the auction: you cannot pass, you can only be outbid or run out of time
serverErrors.ALREADY_ROLLED: You have already rolled this turn
serverErrors.NOT_ROLLED_YET: You must roll the dice before ending your turn
serverErrors.MUST_ROLL_AGAIN: You rolled doubles and must roll again
serverErrors.RESOLVE_DEBT_FIRST: Resolve your debt before ending your turn
serverErrors.ILLEGAL_MOVE: That piece cannot make that move
serverErrors.TRADE_IN_PROGRESS: A trade is already in progress
serverErrors.SEAT_CONNECTED: Somebody is connected on that seat right now. Try again once they disconnect.
